title: Streamer Mode
description: Allows you to hide your name & to hide other players' names.
body:
## Streamer Mode
Changes your name & others client-side, in order to prevent sniping or accidental leaks (such as alternative accounts) while streaming or recording.

## Where did the mod name come from?
 It came from Discord automatically enabling **Streamer Mode** whenever I opened OBS.                    
#### _Streamer Mode is enabled. Usernames have been truncated_

## Features
- Replacing your username, others and setting specific names for people.
- Preventing accidental leaks (such as alts) while recording or streaming
- Extremely lightweight and easy to use.

## Commands
- /streamer toggle 
- /streamer toggle hideothers
- /streamer change self <username>
- /streamer change others <username>

**Note:** Other players can not see your spoofed username / what username you set theirs. Players will still see your real username on **their** screen.
